Table.name: employee
Table.comment: resource table is the human resource - both employees and students
Table.commentInRDBMS: resource table is the human resource - both employees and students

Column.name: profile_photo
Column.comment: Photo of the Employee - Passport size
Column.commentInRDBMS: Photo of the Employee - Passport size
Column.notes: Photo of the Employee - Passport size

Column.name: sig_image
Column.comment: Photo of the Employee - Passport size
Column.notes: Photo of the Employee - Passport size

Column.name: emr_email
Column.comment: Email of the Emergency Contact person
Column.commentInRDBMS: Email of the Emergency Contact person
Column.notes: Email of the Emergency Contact person

Column.name: last_working_day
Column.comment: Last working days of the employee
Column.commentInRDBMS: Last working days of the employee

Column.name: changed_on
Column.comment: Last record changed - date and time
Column.commentInRDBMS: Last record changed - date and time
Column.notes: Last record changed - date and time
